---
id: runs
title: "Get EOD run attempts for a business date"
description: "Returns run history for the given date. Defaults to today when as_of_date is omitted."
sidebar_label: "Get EOD run attempts for a business date"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get EOD run attempts for a business date"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/eod/runs"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns run history for the given date. Defaults to today when as_of_date is omitted.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
